caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap with a logo on the front, and black over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. The background consists of dark, textured soundproofing foam panels. The microphone is held by a shock mount with a visible label that reads "Boutique Studio Mic 2000". The man has a visible tattoo on his upper right arm. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, speaking into the microphone with slight variations in his facial expression and the position of his mouth. The camera angle remains a consistent medium close-up, capturing him from the chest up as he interacts with the recording equipment. There are no other people present in the scene, and the environment remains static throughout the duration of the clip.
